body:
## Goal
Add SoundLike guide for Eloy Casagrande (Sepultura) + companion LLM file.

## Rationale
Eloy appears in top-10 GA4 pages this week (organic signal confirmed). Guide captures 'how to sound like sepultura drums' long-tail queries. DW/Meinl kit. No SoundLike competition in this sub-niche.

## Action
1. Add to `packages/frontend/data/soundLikeGuides.js`:
   ```js
   { slug: 'how-to-sound-like-eloy-casagrande', drummerSlug: 'eloy-casagrande', name: 'Eloy Casagrande', band: 'Sepultura' }
   ```
2. Create guide content following `how-to-sound-like-matt-greiner` template:
   - Gear overview (kit, cymbals, pedals, sticks)
   - Technique breakdown (3-5 key techniques)
   - Practice exercises
   - Recording/mixing tips
   - ≥3 FAQ Q&As
   - Internal links: Eloy's profile, relevant Sepultura album articles
3. Add `public/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-eloy-casagrande.md` (≥100 words structured markdown)

## Quality gate
- ≥400 words
- HowTo + Article JSON-LD schema (match existing SoundLike template)
- ≥3 FAQs
- ≥3 internal links
- LLM companion file ≥100 words

## Verify
```bash
grep 'eloy-casagrande' packages/frontend/data/soundLikeGuides.js
ls public/llms/guides/how-to-sound-like-eloy-casagrande.md
```

_Split from #2135 (batch too large for watcher — 3 days stale, 0 activity)_
title: feat(seo): Add SoundLike guide — Eloy Casagrande / Sepultura (split 1/4 of #2135)
